title: 8 Habits a Man of God Builds in His 20s
caption:
Habits separate the man from the boy.

Not age. Not income. Not how long he's been in church. The habits.

Because a man who can't keep his word to himself can't be trusted with much else. A man who can't say no to his wallet or his body hasn't learned self-governance. A man who ends every day on the feed is being formed by what's worst about the world.

Build these eight. Not all at once — one at a time. But start now, while the habits that form you are still yours to choose.

Which one do you already have? Which one do you need to build this week?

#faith #discipline #godlymen #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #habits #selfmastery #formation
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
